Residents survey

  • Tweet

Shoreham is one of the most beautiful villages in the whole of Kent. I love spending time here, whether it’s meeting the brilliant teachers and pupils at Shoreham Primary School, walking along the Darent Valley path, visiting Castle Farm or eating and drinking at either the Samuel Palmer, or Mount Vineyard. It is such a precious location and one that I will always stand up for to ensure it remains a great place to live. 

I know from previous survey’s how much you all care – like me - about protecting our much-loved Green Belt land, improving local rail and bus services and addressing the speeding through the village. But I always want to keep up to date on the things that you are worried about or want changed, so with that in mind I’ve enclosed a short survey so that I can hear from you directly.

I look forward to hearing from you.

Shoreham Residents Survey

  • Current Your local priorities
Questions No problem Minor problem Serious problem
9. How long have you lived in Shoreham?
10. Which age group are you in?
11. I would like to be kept up-to-date on future campaigns by Laura Trott MP.

Laura Trott MP for Sevenoaks
